Tests multiplication of two negative infinity values resulting in positive infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests a specific mathematical operation in JavaScript. It checks if multiplying `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` by itself results in `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`. This assertion is used to verify the behavior of the JavaScript engine when handling operations involving infinite values. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of number operations in JavaScript.
